jobs.title: Angular / Java - Senior Full-Stack Developer
jobs.description:
Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. Fincons is a multinational with over 2,600 people and several offices worldwide (in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium, and the USA), but above all a Family Company where the founders play a strategic role with commitment and passion, grounding the company in the same principles of a united and caring family.

We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people.

Job Overview For our Lugano Office (Switzerland), we are seeking a highly skilled Senior Full-Stack Engineer with a strong front-end focus on Angular v15+ , combined with solid experience in Java-based backend development. The ideal candidate brings deep technical proficiency, solid architectural insight, and the ability to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions. What you'll do:

- Frontend Development (main focus): Design and develop intuitive, responsive, and high-performance web applications using Angular v15+ and TypeScript, ensuring excellent user experience and seamless integration with backend services
- Java Backend & Microservices Development: Design, develop, and maintain Java-based backend solutions, including RESTful APIs and microservices using Spring Boot, contributing to scalable and reliable system architectures
- API Design & Integration: Implement and consume REST APIs, ensuring clean contracts, performance, and maintainability across front-end and backend components
- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with Agile teams and product owners to gather requirements, translate business needs into technical specifications, and produce clear, high-quality documentation
- Secure Coding Practices: Apply industry-leading secure coding standards to deliver robust, compliant solutions aligned with regulatory and security requirements.

## What you bring

- Bachelor's/Master's degree, preferably in computer science or engineering
- 5+ years of experience in full stack development, with a strong emphasis on:Angular (v15+) and TypeScriptJava 11+, Spring Boot, and Spring Data
- Angular (v15+) and TypeScript
- Java 11+, Spring Boot, and Spring Data
- Advanced practical skills in implementing REST API
- Hands-on experience with database integrations, SQL, and event streaming systems like Apache Kafka or RabbitMQ
- Solid knowledge of JPA and Hibernate
- Bring Strong knowledge of DevOps practices and modern CI/CD pipelines, including hands-on experience with tools such as Docker, Kubernetes, Maven, Gradle, and GitHub
- Advanced knowledge of secure coding best practices
- Solid understanding of Agile Framework, with proven experience working in Scrum or SAFe environments
- Ability to collaborate effectively within cross-functional teams and contribute to continuous improvement practices
- Proficiency in Italian and English is a must

Location and Work Flexibility

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino (Switzerland) or to Italian border areas close to Switzerland
- Work-from-home days may be possible according to the Client's policy

Do not hesitate and apply now!

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and guaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR)

descriptionByLocale.it: La Fincons Group un'azienda di consulenza IT che da 40 anni progetta il futuro digitale di grandi aziende su mercati internazionali. La Fincons Group si basata sulla sua capacit di prevedere e interpretare nuovi modelli di business e l'evoluzione rapida dei sistemi IT costruendo un completo range di servizi: dalla ricerca e consulenza al design e sviluppo, dall'integrazione di software di leading vendor fino all'amministrazione delle applicazioni, supportando i clienti passo dopo passo lungo il loro percorso di trasformazione digitale. Crediamo fermamente nel valore della cooperazione e nella contribuzione che ogni idea e intuizione pu portare. Crediamo che ogni sforzo possa fare la differenza. La trasformazione della conoscenza in un risorsa strategica il nostro obiettivo aziendale, e lo raggiungiamo con l'aiuto del nostro asset strategico pi importante: le nostre persone. Panoramica del lavoro Per la nostra sede di Lugano (Svizzera), stiamo cercando un ingegnere full-stack senior con una forte attenzione al front-end su Angular v15+, combinata con una solida esperienza di sviluppo backend in Java. L'ideale candidato porta una profonda competenza tecnica, una solida comprensione architettonica e la capacit di consegnare soluzioni scalabili e di alta qualit . - Sviluppo Frontend (attenzione principale): Progettare e sviluppare applicazioni web intuitive, rispostive e di alta prestazione utilizzando Angular v15+ e TypeScript, garantendo un'esperienza utente eccellente e un'integrazione senza problemi con i servizi backend - Sviluppo Backend & Microservizi Java: Progettare, sviluppare e mantenere soluzioni backend in Java, comprese RESTful API e microservizi utilizzando Spring Boot, contribuendo a architetture di sistema scalabili e affidabili - Progettazione e integrazione API: Implementare e consumare REST API, garantendo contratti puliti, prestazioni e manutenibilit tra componenti frontend e backend - Collaborazione Cross-Functionale: Collaborare strettamente con team Agile e proprietari di prodotto per raccogliere requisiti, tradurre bisogni aziendali in specifiche tecniche e produrre documentazione chiara e di alta qualit - Pratiche di codifica sicure: Applicare standard di codifica sicure di livello industriale per consegnare soluzioni robuste e conformi ai requisiti regolatori e di sicurezza. ## Cosa porti - Laurea magistrale, preferibilmente in informatica o ingegneria - 5+ anni di esperienza in sviluppo full-stack, con un forte accento su: Angular (v15+) e TypeScript Java 11+, Spring Boot e Spring Data - Abilit pratica avanzata nell'implementazione di REST API - Esperienza pratica con integrazioni di database, SQL e sistemi di streaming eventi come Apache Kafka o RabbitMQ - Solida conoscenza di JPA e Hibernate - Porta una solida conoscenza di pratiche DevOps e pipeline CI/CD moderne, compresa esperienza pratica con strumenti come Docker, Kubernetes, Maven, Gradle e GitHub - Conoscenza avanzata di pratiche di codifica sicure - Solida comprensione del Framework Agile, con esperienza provata nel lavorare in ambienti Scrum o SAFe - Capacit di collaborare efficacemente all'interno di team cross-functionali e contribuire a pratiche di miglioramento continuo - Competenza in italiano e inglese un requisito Posizione e flessibilit di lavoro - Si prega di notare che una politica di lavoro remoto completamente remoto non offerta per questo ruolo - I candidati dovrebbero essere pronti a trasferirsi nel Canton Ticino (Svizzera) o nelle aree di confine italiane vicine alla Svizzera - Giorni di lavoro da casa possono essere possibili secondo la politica del Cliente Non esitare e

descriptionByLocale.de: Die Fincons Group ist ein IT-Beratungsunternehmen, das seit 40 Jahren die digitale Zukunft von führenden Unternehmen auf internationalen Märkten entwickelt. Die Fincons Group hat sich auf ihre Fähigkeit aufgebaut, neue Geschäftsmodelle und die schnelle Evolution von IT-Systemen vorherzusagen und zu interpretieren, indem sie ein umfassendes Spektrum von Dienstleistungen entwickelt: von der Forschung und Beratung bis zum Design und der Entwicklung, von der Integration von Softwarelösungen von führenden Anbietern bis hin zur Anwendungsbetreuung, um Kunden Schritt für Schritt auf ihrem Weg der digitalen Transformation zu unterstützen. Die Fincons Group ist ein multinationaler Konzern mit über 2.600 Mitarbeitern und mehreren Niederlassungen weltweit (in Italien, der Schweiz, Deutschland, Frankreich, dem Vereinigten Königreich, Belgien und den USA), aber vor allem eine Familienunternehmen, bei der die Gründer eine strategische Rolle spielen, mit Engagement und Leidenschaft, und die das Unternehmen auf den gleichen Prinzipien einer einigen und sorgenden Familie gründen. Wir glauben fest an den Wert der Zusammenarbeit und an die Beiträge, die jede Idee und Intuition leisten können. Wir glauben, dass jeder Einsatz eine Differenz machen kann. Die Umwandlung von Wissen in ein strategisches Ressourcen ist unser Unternehmensziel, und wir verfolgen es mit der Hilfe unseres strategischsten Assets: unsere Mitarbeiter. Überblick über die Stelle Für unsere Niederlassung in Lugano (Schweiz) suchen wir einen erfahrenen Full-Stack-Entwickler mit einem starken Schwerpunkt auf Frontend-Entwicklung in Angular v15+, kombiniert mit einer soliden Erfahrung in der Backend-Entwicklung in Java. Der ideale Kandidat bringt tiefe technische Kompetenzen, eine solide architektonische Einsicht und die Fähigkeit, skalierbare und hochwertige Lösungen zu liefern. Was du tun wirst: - Frontend-Entwicklung (Hauptschwerpunkt): Entwickle intuitive, responsiv und leistungsfähige Webanwendungen mit Angular v15+ und TypeScript, um eine hervorragende Benutzererfahrung und eine reibungslose Integration mit Backend-Diensten sicherzustellen - Java-Backend- und Microservices-Entwicklung: Entwickle, entwickle und pflege Java-basierte Backend-Lösungen, einschließlich RESTful-APIs und Microservices mit Spring Boot, um skalierbare und zuverlässige Systemarchitekturen beizutragen - API-Design und -Integration: Implementiere und konsumiere REST-APIs, um saubere Verträge, Leistung und Wartbarkeit zwischen Frontend- und Backend-Komponenten sicherzustellen - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Arbeite eng mit Agile-Teams und Produktbesitzern zusammen, um Anforderungen zu sammeln, Geschäftsbedürfnisse in technische Spezifikationen umzuwandeln und klare und hochwertige Dokumentation zu erstellen - Sichere Kodierpraktiken: Anwenden Sie führende sichere Kodierstandards, um robuste und konforme Lösungen zu liefern, die den regulatorischen und Sicherheitsanforderungen entsprechen. ## Was du bringst - Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss, bevorzugt in Informatik oder Ingenieurwesen - 5+ Jahre Erfahrung in Full-Stack-Entwicklung, mit einem starken Schwerpunkt auf: Angular (v15+) und TypeScript Java 11+, Spring Boot und Spring Data - Fortgeschrittene praktische Fähigkeiten bei der Implementierung von REST-APIs - Praktische Erfahrung mit Datenbankintegrationen, SQL und Ereignisstreaming-Systemen wie Apache Kafka oder RabbitMQ - Solide Kenntnisse von JPA und Hibernate - Bringe starke Kenntnisse von DevOps-Praktiken und modernen CI/CD-Pipelines, einschließlich praktischer Erfahrung mit Tools wie Docker, Kubernetes, Maven, Gradle und GitHub - Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse von sicheren Kodierpraktiken - Solide Verständnis des Agile-Frameworks, mit bewährter Erfahrung im Arbeiten in Scrum- oder SAFe-Umgebungen - Fähigkeit, effektiv innerhalb von Cross-Functional-Teams zu arbeiten und zum kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsprozess beizutragen - Kompetenz in Deutsch und Englisch ist erforderlich Standort und Arbeitsflexibilität - Bitte beachten Sie, dass eine vollständig remote Arbeitspolitik für diese Rolle nicht angeboten wird - Kandidaten sollten bereit sein, sich in den Kanton Ticino (Schweiz) oder in die italienischen Grenzgebiete in der Nähe der Schweiz umzusiedeln - Home-Office-Tage können je nach Client-Politik möglich sein Zögern Sie nicht und bewerben Sie sich jetzt! Unsere Personalrekrutierung richtet sich an Kandidaten aller Geschlechter. Die Daten werden ausschließlich für die Zwecke dieser oder zukünftiger Auswahlverfahren verarbeitet und gespeichert, in Übereinstimmung mit dem Bundesdatenschutzgesetz (LPD) und unter Garantie der in Artikel 13 des Gesetzesdekrets 196/03 und der EU-Verordnung 679/2016 (GDPR) genannten Rechte
descriptionByLocale.fr: La Fincons Group est une entreprise de conseil en informatique qui a conçu l'avenir numérique de grandes entreprises sur les marchés internationaux depuis 40 ans. La Fincons Group s'est basée sur sa capacité à prédire et à interpréter de nouveaux modèles de business et l'évolution rapide des systèmes informatiques en construisant un large éventail de services : de la recherche et du conseil au design et au développement, de l'intégration de solutions logicielles de fournisseurs de premier plan jusqu'à la gestion d'applications, en soutenant les clients étape par étape dans leur parcours de transformation numérique. Nous croyons fermement dans la valeur de la coopération et dans la contribution que chaque idée et intuition peuvent apporter. Nous croyons que chaque effort peut faire la différence. La transformation de la connaissance en une ressource stratégique est notre objectif commercial, et nous la poursuivons avec l'aide de notre actif stratégique le plus important : nos employés. Vue d'ensemble de l'emploi Pour notre bureau de Lugano (Suisse), nous recherchons un développeur full-stack senior avec un fort accent sur le développement frontend en Angular v15+, combiné à une solide expérience de développement backend en Java. Le candidat idéal apporte une profonde compétence technique, une solide compréhension architecturale et la capacité de livrer des solutions échelonnées et de haute qualité. - Développement Frontend (accent principal) : Conception et développement d'applications web intuitives, réactives et de haute performance en utilisant Angular v15+ et TypeScript, en garantissant une expérience utilisateur exceptionnelle et une intégration sans problème avec les services backend - Développement Backend & Microservices Java : Conception, développement et maintenance de solutions backend en Java, y compris des API REST et des microservices en utilisant Spring Boot, contribuant à des architectures de système échelonnées et fiables - Conception et intégration d'API : Mise en œuvre et consommation d'API REST, en garantissant des contrats propres, des performances et de la maintenabilité entre les composants frontend et backend - Collaboration Cross-Functionnelle : Travail en étroite collaboration avec les équipes Agile et les propriétaires de produit pour recueillir les besoins, traduire les besoins commerciaux en spécifications techniques et produire des documents clairs et de haute qualité - Pratiques de codage sécurisées : Appliquer des normes de codage sécurisées de niveau industriel pour livrer des solutions robustes et conformes aux exigences réglementaires et de sécurité. ## Ce que vous apportez - Diplôme de licence ou de master, préférablement en informatique ou en ingénierie - 5+ ans d'expérience en développement full-stack, avec un fort accent sur : Angular (v15+) et TypeScript Java 11+, Spring Boot et Spring Data - Compétences pratiques avancées dans l'implémentation d'API REST - Expérience pratique avec les intégrations de bases de données, SQL et systèmes de streaming d'événements comme Apache Kafka ou RabbitMQ - Connaissances solides de JPA et Hibernate - Apportez des connaissances solides de pratiques DevOps et de pipelines CI/CD modernes, y compris l'expérience pratique avec des outils comme Docker, Kubernetes, Maven, Gradle et GitHub - Connaissances avancées de pratiques de codage sécurisées - Connaissances solides du Framework Agile, avec une expérience prouvée dans le travail dans des environnements Scrum ou SAFe - Capacité à collaborer efficacement dans des équipes cross-functionnelles et à contribuer aux pratiques d'amélioration continue - Compétence en français et en anglais est un must Emplacement et flexibilité de travail - Veuillez noter que la politique de travail à distance complète n'est pas offerte pour ce poste - Les candidats devraient être prêts à se déplacer dans le canton de Tessin (Suisse) ou dans les zones frontalières italiennes proches de la Suisse - Les jours de travail à domicile peuvent être possibles en fonction de la politique du client N'hésitez pas et postulez maintenant! Notre recherche de personnel est adressée à des candidats de tous les genres. Les données seront traitées et stockées exclusivement pour les besoins de cette ou de futures sélections, en conformité avec la loi fédérale sur la protection des données (LPD) et en garantissant les droits mentionnés à l'article 13 du décret législatif 196/03 et de la réglementation UE 679/2016 (GDPR)

jobs.title: Application Owner - Banking - Corporate Actions
jobs.description:
Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. Fincons is a multinational with over 2,600 people and several offices worldwide (in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium, and the USA), but above all a Family Company where the founders play a strategic role with commitment and passion, grounding the company in the same principles of a united and caring family.

We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people.

Job Overview We are looking for an Application Owner to take end to end ownership of a core application in Corporate Actions & Securities . You will ensure stability, evolution, compliance, and seamless integration across banking processes—acting as the key bridge between Business, IT, vendors, and external stakeholders.

Responsibilities

- Own the application lifecycle: roadmap, functional/technical governance, incident/problem/change (ITIL).
- Define and monitor SLA/OLA, performance and capacity; drive reliability and risk mitigation.
- Oversee Corporate Actions flows and manage Securities lifecycle
- Ensure compliance with regulations and IT Security policies.
- Coordinate IT Activities with internal internal and external stakeholders
- Acting as the key bridge between Business & IT
- Enable observability and deliver KPI reporting

Your profile

- 5+ years in IT/Application Management within Banking area
- Strong understanding of banking processes with focus on Securities and Corporate Actions.
- Solid communication with business & technical stakeholders;
- Ownership mindset and decision making.
- Italian fluent and English proficient (spoken & written).

Location and Work Flexibility

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino (Switzerland) or to Italian border areas close to Switzerland

Do not hesitate and apply now!

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and guaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR)

descriptionByLocale.de: Die Fincons Group ist ein IT-Business-Beratungsunternehmen, das seit 40 Jahren die digitale Zukunft führender Unternehmen auf internationalen Märkten gestaltet. Die Fincons Group baute ihren Ruf auf der Vorhersage und Interpretation neuer Geschäftsmodelle und der schnellen Entwicklung von IT-Systemen auf, indem sie ein komplettes Dienstleistungsspektrum aufbaute: von Forschung und Beratung über Design und Entwicklung, von der Systemintegration führender Anbieter von Softwarelösungen bis hin zum Anwendungsmanagement und unterstützt Kunden Schritt für Schritt auf ihrem Weg zur digitalen Transformation. Fincons ist ein multinationales Unternehmen mit über 2.600 Mitarbeitern und mehreren Niederlassungen weltweit (in Italien, der Schweiz, Deutschland, Frankreich, dem Vereinigten Königreich, Belgien und den USA), aber vor allem ein Familienunternehmen, in dem die Gründer mit Engagement und Leidenschaft eine strategische Rolle spielen und das Unternehmen auf den gleichen Prinzipien einer vereinten und fürsorglichen Familie gründen. Wir glauben fest an den Wert der Zusammenarbeit und an den Beitrag, den jede Idee und Intuition leisten kann. Wir glauben, dass der Einsatz jedes Einzelnen einen Unterschied machen kann. Wissen in eine strategische Ressource umzuwandeln, ist unsere Unternehmensmission, und wir verfolgen sie mit Hilfe unseres strategischsten Kapitals: unseren Mitarbeitern. Stellenübersicht Wir suchen einen Anwendungseigentümer, der die Gesamtverantwortung für eine Kernanwendung im Bereich Corporate Actions & Securities übernimmt. Sie sorgen für Stabilität, Weiterentwicklung, Compliance und nahtlose Integration aller Bankprozesse und fungieren als wichtige Brücke zwischen Business, IT, Anbietern und externen Stakeholdern. Verantwortlichkeiten – Verantwortlich für den Anwendungslebenszyklus: Roadmap, funktionale/technische Governance, Vorfall/Problem/Änderung (ITIL). - SLA/OLA, Leistung und Kapazität definieren und überwachen; Antriebszuverlässigkeit und Risikominderung. - Überwachen Sie die Abläufe von Kapitalmaßnahmen und verwalten Sie den Wertpapierlebenszyklus. - Stellen Sie die Einhaltung von Vorschriften und IT-Sicherheitsrichtlinien sicher. - Koordinieren Sie IT-Aktivitäten mit internen und externen Stakeholdern. - Fungieren Sie als wichtige Brücke zwischen Business und IT. - Ermöglichen Sie Beobachtbarkeit und liefern Sie KPI-Reporting. Ihr Profil: Mehr als 5 Jahre im IT-/Anwendungsmanagement im Bankbereich. - Ausgeprägtes Verständnis von Bankprozessen mit Schwerpunkt auf Wertpapieren und Corporate Actions. - Solide Kommunikation mit geschäftlichen und technischen Interessengruppen; - Eigentumsmentalität und Entscheidungsfindung. - Fließende Italienisch- und Englischkenntnisse (in Wort und Schrift). jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer Angular/.NET
jobs.description:
Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. Fincons is a multinational with over 2,600 people and several offices worldwide (in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium and the USA), but above all a Family Company where the founders play a strategic role with commitment and passion, grounding the company in the same principles of a united and caring family.

We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people.

We are looking for Senior Full-Stack Developers with a strong focus on Angular (Front-End) and experience in .NET/ # (Back-End) to be part on full-time mode of international projects based in Lugano .

Roles and Responsibilities

- Design and implement high-quality software solutions across the full stack, with primary focus on Angular development
- Develop robust and scalable backend services using C# and .NET
- Apply best practices such as TDD, DDD, Clean Code, and SOLID principles
- Collaborate closely with architects and technical leads to define optimal technical solutions and infrastructure
- Ensure high delivery standards with strong attention to CI/CD pipelines and automated testing
- Take ownership of the performance, reliability, and scalability of applications
- Analyze business requirements and proactively propose technical solutions aligned with client objectives

Qualifications and Skills

- Scientific degree (Bachelor’s or Master’s), preferably in Computer Science or Engineering
- At least 5 years of experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer
- Strong expertise in Angular (latest versions) and TypeScript
- Solid experience with C# and .NET (Core / .NET 6+)
- Good understanding of frontend architecture, state management and API integration
- Hands-on experience with TDD, Clean Code and SOLID principles
- Experience working with relational databases (SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL or DB2) and strong SQL knowledge
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and modern DevOps practices
- Fluent Italian and English (both spoken and written)

Location and Work Flexibility

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino (Switzerland) or to Italian border areas close to Switzerland
- Work-from-home days may be possible according to the Client's policy

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders. The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and guaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR).

jobs.title: JAVA Senior Engineer
jobs.description:
Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people.

Job Overview

For our Lugano Office (Switzerland), we are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer with strong expertise in designing and implementing JAVA REST-based API systems. The ideal candidate brings deep technical proficiency, solid architectural insight, and the ability to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions. What you'll do:

- Development & Integration: Design, develop, integrate, and test Java-based backend solutions, microservices architectures, and REST APIs
- Expertise in Java/Microservices/API Solutions: Act as a subject matter expert, supporting the lifecycle management and development of robust Java solutions
- Collaboration: Work closely with Agile teams, providing expert consultation and support to product owners to gather requirements and document solutions that align with business objectives
- Secure Coding: Apply best practices in secure coding to ensure all solutions are robust, secure, and aligned with regulatory requirements

## What you bring

- Bachelor's/Master's degree, preferably in computer science or engineering
- 5+ years of experience in software design and development of Java microservices architecture
- Advanced practical skills with Spring Boot, Spring Security and REST APIs development
- Hands-on experience with database integrations, SQL, and event streaming systems like Apache Kafka
- Hands-on experience with testing in Java, including unit, integration, and end-to-end testing (e.g. JUnit, Mockito, or similar frameworks)
- Advanced knowledge of secure coding best practices
- Experience in architecting distributed systems with best practices for system design and implementation
- Proficiency in Italian and English is a must
- Experience with Agile/Scrum methodology is a plus

Location and Work Flexibility

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino/Switzerland or Italian border areas close to Switzerland (ex. Como)
- Work-from-home days may be possible according to the Client's policy

Do not hesitate and apply now!

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

jobs.title: Mobile Developer (Kotlin Multiplatform)
jobs.description:
#Innovation and Technology #Permanent Position #International Mind-set #Challenging Projects

Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people. We are seeking a proactive, quality-focused Mobile Developer with a solid understanding of the mobile development lifecycle and modern app architecture. In this role, you will contribute to both the design and development of advanced features, leveraging modern technologies such as Kotlin Multiplatform . You will be responsible for writing clean, scalable, and robust code that meets the highest standards of quality and reliability. Key Responsibilities

- Designing and building scalable, reusable mobile solutions
- Writing clean, high-performing code using Kotlin Multiplatform
- Testing and optimizing features for performance, usability, and reliability
- Troubleshooting and resolving bugs, edge cases, and performance issues
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
- Contributing to product design and feature planning with the product team
- Documenting features and technical implementations clearly
- Championing clean architecture, security, and performance best practices

Required Qualifications and Skills

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience
- 5+ years of experience developing Android and iOS applications
- Practical knowledge of Kotlin Multiplatform
- Experience with MVVM, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, Flow, and REST API integrations
- A strong grasp of mobile security, performance, and responsive UI design
- A mindset for clean code, design patterns, and scalable architecture
- Strong communication and collaboration skills
- English and Italian proficiency required
- Experience working in Agile teams and mentoring others is a plus

Location Requirement

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino/Switzerland or towns near the Swiss-Italian border
- Work-from-home days may be possible according to the Client's policy

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and g uaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR)

jobs.description:
#Innovation and Technology #Permanent Position #International Mind-set #Challenging Projects

Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Test Automation Engineer to ensure the quality, performance, and reliability of our software products. In this role, you will design, develop, and maintain backend automated tests written in Java , with a strong focus on robust API testing. You will collaborate closely with the development team to integrate testing practices into the development lifecycle and continuously enhance test coverage and efficiency. Key Responsibilities

- Design, implement, and maintain Java‑based automated test scripts for backend systems, with a strong emphasis on API testing
- Contribute to test automation coverage of frontend systems when needed
- Translate technical and business requirements into effective and reusable test scenarios
- Execute automated test cases, analyze results, and report defects in a timely and detailed manner
- Investigate and troubleshoot failures and issues during test runs
- Ensure seamless integration of automated tests within CI/CD pipelines
- Define and implement quality control standards and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives
- Collaborate with the development team to understand application workflows and develop comprehensive test strategies

Required Qualifications and Skills

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience
- 5+ years of hands-on experience building and improving backend test automation frameworks in Java, with a proven track record in API testing
- In-depth experience with tools such as Postman, SoapUI, JMeter
- Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, including test design, automation, validation, and troubleshooting
- Practical experience using SQL for data verification and test setup

descriptionByLocale.de: #Innovation und Technologie #Festanstellung #Internationale Ausrichtung #Herausfordernde Projekte Die Fincons Group ist ein IT-Unternehmensberatungsunternehmen, das seit 40 Jahren die digitale Zukunft führender Unternehmen auf internationalen Märkten gestaltet. Die Fincons Group hat ihren Ruf auf der Voraussicht und Interpretation neuer Geschäftsmodelle und der schnellen Evolution von IT-Systemen aufgebaut, indem sie ein umfassendes Angebot an Dienstleistungen anbietet: von Forschung und Beratung bis hin zu Design und Entwicklung, von der Systemintegration von führenden Software-Lösungen bis hin zur Anwendungsmanagement, unterstützt Kunden Schritt für Schritt auf ihrem digitalen Transformationsweg. Fincons ist ein multinationales Unternehmen mit über 2.600 Mitarbeitern und mehreren Büros weltweit (in Italien, Schweiz, Deutschland, Frankreich, Großbritannien, Belgien und den USA), aber vor allem eine Familienunternehmen, in dem die Gründer eine strategische Rolle mit Engagement und Leidenschaft spielen, die das Unternehmen in denselben Prinzipien einer vereinten und fürsorglichen Familie gründen. Wir glauben fest an den Wert der Kooperation und an den Beitrag, den jede Idee und Intuition bringen kann. Wir glauben, dass jeder Einsatz einen Unterschied machen kann. Die Transformation von Wissen in eine strategische Ressource ist unsere Unternehmensmission, und wir verfolgen sie mit Hilfe unseres wichtigsten strategischen Vermögens: unserer Mitarbeiter. Wir suchen einen hochqualifizierten und motivierten Test-Automatisierungsingenieur, um die Qualität, Leistung und Zuverlässigkeit unserer Software-Produkte sicherzustellen. In dieser Rolle werden Sie backend-automatisierte Tests, die in Java geschrieben sind, entwerfen, entwickeln und warten, mit einem starken Fokus auf robuste API-Tests. Sie werden eng mit dem Entwicklungsteam zusammenarbeiten, um Testpraktiken in den Entwicklungslebenszyklus zu integrieren und die Testabdeckung und -effizienz kontinuierlich zu verbessern. Hauptverantwortungen - Entwerfen, Implementieren und Warten von Java-basierten automatisierten Testskripten für Backend-Systeme, mit einem starken Schwerpunkt auf API-Tests - Beitrag zur Testautomatisierungsabdeckung von Frontend-Systemen bei Bedarf - Übersetzung technischer und geschäftlicher Anforderungen in effektive und wiederverwendbare Testszenarien - Ausführen automatisierter Testfälle, Analysieren von Ergebnissen und Berichten von Defekten in einer zeitnahen und detaillierten Weise - Untersuchen und Beheben von Fehlern und Problemen während der Testläufe - Sicherstellung einer nahtlosen Integration von automatisierten Tests innerhalb von CI/CD-Pipelines - Definieren und Implementieren von Qualitätskontrollstandards und Beitrag zu kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsinitiativen - Zusammenarbeit mit dem Entwicklungsteam, um Anwendungsarbeitsflüsse zu verstehen und umfassende Teststrategien zu entwickeln Erforderliche Qualifikationen und Fähigkeiten - Bachelor-Abschluss in Informatik, Computertechnik oder gleichwertige Erfahrung - 5+ Jahre Erfahrung in der Erstellung und Verbesserung von Backend-Testautomatisierungsframeworks in Java, mit einem nachgewiesenen Track Record in API-Tests - Tiefere Erfahrung mit Tools wie Postman, SoapUI, JMeter - Solides Verständnis von RESTful APIs, einschließlich Testdesign, Automatisierung, Validierung und Troubleshooting - Praktische Erfahrung mit SQL für die Datenüberprüfung und Testeinrichtung - Vertrautheit mit CI/CD-Tools (z.B. Jenkins, GitHub Actions usw.) - Erfahrung mit Jira und Xray für das Testmanagement - Hervorragende Kenntnisse von Deutsch und Englisch (gesprochen und geschrieben) - ISTQB-Zertifizierung oder ähnlich ist ein Plus - Praktische Erfahrung mit Tools wie Tosca Tricentis ist ein Plus - Solides Verständnis von agilen Methoden und Erfahrung in Scrum-Teams Standortanforderungen - Bitte beachten Sie, dass für diese Rolle keine vollständig remote Arbeitspolitik angeboten wird - Kandidaten sollten bereit sein, in den Kanton Tessin/Schweiz oder in Städte nahe der schweiz-italienischen Grenze umzuziehen - Arbeit-von-Hause-Tage könnten je nach Kundenpolitik möglich sein Zögern Sie nicht und bewerben Sie sich jetzt! Unsere Personalsuche richtet sich an Kandidaten aller Geschlechter. descriptionByLocale.fr: #Innovation et Technologie #Poste Permanent #Mentalité Internationale #Projets Défis Fincons Group est une société de conseil en informatique qui conçoit l'avenir numérique des entreprises leaders sur les marchés internationaux depuis 40 ans. Fincons Group a bâti sa réputation en prévoyant et en interprétant de nouveaux modèles d'affaires et l'évolution rapide des systèmes informatiques, en offrant une gamme complète de services : de la recherche et du conseil à la conception et au développement, de l'intégration des systèmes de solutions logicielles leaders jusqu'à la gestion des applications, en soutenant les clients étape par étape dans leur parcours de transformation numérique. Fincons est une multinationale avec plus de 2 600 personnes et plusieurs bureaux dans le monde (en Italie, en Suisse, en Allemagne, en France, au Royaume-Uni, en Belgique et aux États-Unis), mais surtout une entreprise familiale où les fondateurs jouent un rôle stratégique avec engagement et passion, en ancrant l'entreprise dans les mêmes principes d'une famille unie et solidaire. Nous croyons fermement à la valeur de la coopération et à la contribution que chaque idée et intuition peut apporter. Nous croyons que l'effort de chacun peut faire une différence. Transformer les connaissances en une ressource stratégique est notre mission d'entreprise, et nous la poursuivons avec l'aide de notre actif le plus stratégique : nos personnes. Nous recherchons un ingénieur de test automatisé hautement qualifié et motivé pour assurer la qualité, les performances et la fiabilité de nos produits logiciels. Dans ce rôle, vous concevrez, développerez et maintiendrez des tests automatisés backend écrits en Java, avec un fort accent sur les tests API robustes. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec l'équipe de développement pour intégrer les pratiques de test dans le cycle de vie du développement et améliorer continuellement la couverture et l'efficacité des tests. Responsabilités Principales - Concevoir, mettre en œuvre et maintenir des scripts de test automatisés basés sur Java pour les systèmes backend, avec un fort accent sur les tests API - Contribuer à la couverture des tests automatisés des systèmes frontend si nécessaire - Traduire les exigences techniques et commerciales en scénarios de test efficaces et réutilisables - Exécuter des cas de test automatisés, analyser les résultats et signaler les défauts de manière rapide et détaillée - Investiguer et résoudre les problèmes et les questions pendant les exécutions des tests - Assurer l'intégration transparente des tests automatisés dans les pipelines CI/CD - Définir et mettre en œuvre des normes de contrôle de la qualité et contribuer aux initiatives d'amélioration continue - Collaborer avec l'équipe de développement pour comprendre les flux de travail de l'application et développer des stratégies de test complètes Qualifications et Compétences Requises - Diplôme de licence en informatique, ingénierie informatique ou expérience équivalente - 5+ ans d'expérience pratique dans la création et l'amélioration de frameworks de test automatisés backend en Java, avec un bilan éprouvé dans les tests API - Expérience approfondie avec des outils tels que Postman, SoapUI, JMeter - Compréhension solide des API RESTful, y compris la conception de tests, l'automatisation, la validation et la résolution des problèmes - Expérience pratique avec SQL pour la vérification des données et la configuration des tests - Familiarité avec les outils CI/CD (par exemple, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.) - Expérience avec Jira et Xray pour la gestion des tests - Excellente maîtrise du français et de l'anglais (parlé et écrit) - Certification ISTQB ou similaire est un plus - Expérience pratique avec des outils tels que Tosca Tricentis est un plus - Compréhension solide des méthodologies agiles et expérience de travail en équipes Scrum Exigences de Localisation - Veuillez noter qu'une politique de travail entièrement à distance n'est pas offerte pour ce rôle - Les candidats doivent être prêts à se réinstaller dans le canton du Tessin/Suisse ou dans des villes proches de la frontière suisse-italienne - Les jours de travail à domicile peuvent être possibles selon la politique du client N'hésitez pas et postulez maintenant ! Notre recherche de personnel est adressée à des candidats de tous les genres. Les données seront traitées et stockées exclusivement aux fins de cette ou de futures sélections, conformément à la loi fédérale sur la protection des données (LPD) et en garantissant les droits visés à l'article 13 du décret législatif 196/03 et du règlement UE 679/2016 (GDPR)

jobs.title: Senior IT Business Analyst
jobs.description:
Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. Fincons is a multinational with over 2,600 people and several offices worldwide (in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium and the USA), but above all a Family Company where the founders play a strategic role with commitment and passion, grounding the company in the same principles of a united and caring family.

We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people.

We are looking for a Senior IT Business Analyst with strong SQL expertise and solid functional analysis experience to join us in Lugano. The role acts as a key interface between business stakeholders and technical teams, supporting business needs and IT projects in the banking industry. Responsibilities:

- Define and manage functional analysis for regulatory, business, and IT projects
- Define, plan, and execute User Acceptance Testing (UAT) activities
- Take ownership of complex functional incidents in collaboration with business stakeholders
- Leverage advanced SQL to analyze, manipulate, and extract data in support of business needs
- Collaborate with IT teams to design and propose IT solutions aligned with business requirements

## Must-have Skills

- Proven experience of at least 5+ years in an IT Business Analyst role within banking or financial services environments
- Strong SQL expertise, enabling advanced querying, data analysis, and effective interpretation of database structure
- Demonstrated capability in business and functional analysis within complex environments, coupled with the ability to design and model IT solutions
- Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage priorities independently while remaining strongly focused on results
- Fluent in Italian and English
- University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related discipline

## We offer

- Swiss employment contract
- Shape your career through challenging projects in a truly international setting
- Thrive in a positive, engaging, and inclusive workplace

## Location Requirement

- This position is fully office-based, requiring a 5-day-per-week on-site commitment
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino/Switzerland, or be willing to commute from nearby Italian border towns

Are you looking for an exciting job in a dynamic environment? Do not hesitate and apply now!

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and guaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR)

jobs.title: Senior Quality Assurance & Test Automation Engineer
jobs.description:
#Innovation and Technology #Permanent Position #International Mind-set #Challenging Projects

Fincons Group is an IT business consulting company that has been designing the digital future of leading companies on international markets for 40 years. Fincons Group built its reputation on foreseeing and interpreting new business models and the rapid evolution of IT systems by building a complete range of services: from research and consulting to design and development, from system integration of leading vendor software solutions right up to application management, supporting clients step by step along their digital transformation journey. Fincons is a multinational with over 2,600 people and several offices worldwide (in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium and the USA), but above all, a Family Company where the founders play a strategic role with commitment and passion, grounding the company in the same principles of a united and caring family. We firmly believe in the value of cooperation and in the contribution that every idea and intuition can bring. We believe that everyone’s effort can make a difference. Transforming knowledge into a strategic resource is our company mission, and we pursue it with the help of our most strategic asset: our people

We are looking for a highly skilled and hands-on Senior Quality Assurance & Test Automation Engineer to drive the quality, performance, and reliability of our software solutions to the next level.

The Quality Engineer is responsible for ensuring product quality through continuous and structured testing activities across the entire software development lifecycle. Working in close collaboration with developers and the Product Owner, the Quality Engineer contributes actively to sprint planning, defines acceptance criteria, and provides feedback on user stories and business requirements to ensure clarity, feasibility, and testability. Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the main point of contact within the team for all testing and quality assurance (QA) activities, taking full ownership of quality in a cross‑functional (T‑shaped) environment.
- Detect defects early in the development process, automate recurring test scenarios, and ensure that delivered functionality meets both business and user expectations.
- Plan, design, implement, maintain, and execute functional test cases based on specified requirements.
- Monitor and manage testing activities with respect to established quality gates.
- Track, document, and drive defects through their full lifecycle until successful resolution.
- Document and assess test results, investigating anomalies and identifying root causes when issues arise.
- Communicate test progress, results, and potential risks to all relevant stakeholders.
- Support continuous improvement initiatives for QA processes, tools, and testing methodologies.
- Execute and understand automated test cases using tools such as Tosca, Postman, UI Path, or comparable automation frameworks.
- Create test plans, execute test cases, manage defects, and deliver evidence and reporting using Jira and Xray.
- Define appropriate test coverage, including preparation of required test data.

Required Qualifications and Skills

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- Minimum of 5 years of experience in software testing.
- Strong expertise in Agile Testing, Built‑In Quality, and Test Automation principles.
- Hands‑on experience with Xray and Jira for test and defect management.
- Deep understanding of testing concepts, methodologies, and industry best practices.
- Proven ability to track issues and produce clear, well‑structured technical assessment reports.
- Ability to work effectively in complex and challenging environments.
- Highly structured, rigorous, and detail‑oriented approach to testing.
- Experience designing and executing System Integration Tests (System of Systems, end‑to‑end testing).
- Practical experience with API testing.
- Excellent communication and problem‑solving skills.
- Fluency in Italian and English.
- ISTQB Certification (Foundation level or above).
- Previous experience or strong understanding of the banking and/or financial services sector (plus)
- Familiarity with source code management, DevOps practices, and build pipelines supporting automation framework development (plus)
- Knowledge of or hands‑on experience with testing frameworks such as Selenium, Cypress, or equivalent tools (plus).

## Location Requirement

- Please note that a fully remote work policy is not offered for this role
- Candidates should be prepared to relocate to Canton Ticino/Switzerland or towns near the Swiss-Italian border
- Work-from-home days may be possible according to the Client's policy
- Do not hesitate and apply now!

Our personnel search is addressed to candidates of all genders.

The data will be processed and stored exclusively for the purposes of this or future selections, in compliance with the Federal Data Protection Law (LPD) and guaranteeing the rights referred to in art. 13 Legislative Decree 196/03 and EU regulation 679/2016 (GDPR)

descriptionByLocale.it: #Innovation and Technology #Permanent Position #International Mind-set #Challenging Projects Fincons Group Ã ̈ una societÃ di consulenza IT che da 40 anni progetta il futuro digitale delle aziende leader sui mercati internazionali. Fincons Group ha costruito la sua reputazione nel prevedere e interpretare nuovi modelli di business e la rapida evoluzione dei sistemi IT costruendo una gamma completa di servizi: dalla ricerca e dalla consulenza alla progettazione e allo sviluppo, dall'integrazione di sistemi di soluzioni software leader nel settore fino alla gestione delle applicazioni, supportando i clienti passo dopo passo lungo il loro percorso di trasformazione digitale. Fincons è una multinazionale con oltre 2.600 persone e diversi uffici in tutto il mondo (in Italia, Svizzera, Germania, Francia, Regno Unito, Belgio e Stati Uniti), ma soprattutto una Società Famiglia dove i fondatori giocano un ruolo strategico con impegno e passione, fondando l'azienda negli stessi principi di una famiglia unita e premurosa. Crediamo fermamente nel valore della cooperazione e nel contributo che ogni idea e intuizione possono portare. Crediamo che lo sforzo di tutti possa fare la differenza. Trasformare la conoscenza in una risorsa strategica è la nostra missione aziendale, e lo perseguiamo con l'aiuto del nostro asset più strategico: la nostra gente Siamo alla ricerca di un ingegnere di alta qualità e controllo di alta qualità per guidare la qualità, le prestazioni e l'affidabilità delle nostre soluzioni software al livello successivo. L'Ingegnere di Qualità è responsabile di garantire la qualità del prodotto attraverso attività di test continue e strutturate in tutto il ciclo di vita dello sviluppo del software. Lavorando in stretta collaborazione con gli sviluppatori e il Proprietario del Prodotto, l'Ingegnere di Qualità contribuisce attivamente alla pianificazione dello sprint, definisce i criteri di accettazione e fornisce feedback sulle storie degli utenti e sui requisiti aziendali per garantire chiarezza, fattibilità e testabilità. Responsabilità chiave - Servire come punto di contatto principale all'interno del team per tutte le attività di test e garanzia della qualità (QA), assumendo la piena proprietà della qualità in un ambiente interfunzionale (T-shaped). - Rilevare i difetti all'inizio del processo di sviluppo, automatizzare gli scenari di test ricorrenti, e garantire che la funzionalità consegnata soddisfi sia le aspettative aziendali che degli utenti. - Pianificare, progettare, implementare, mantenere ed eseguire casi di test funzionali basati su requisiti specificati. - Monitorare e gestire le attività di test rispetto ai cancelli di qualità stabiliti. - Tracciare, documentare e guidare i difetti attraverso il loro ciclo di vita completo fino a risoluzione di successo. - Documentare e valutare i risultati dei test, indagare le anomalie e identificare le cause della radice quando si presentano problemi. - Comunicare i progressi dei test, i risultati e i potenziali rischi per tutti i soggetti interessati. - Sostenere iniziative di miglioramento continuo per processi, strumenti e metodologie di test QA. - Eseguire e comprendere casi di test automatizzati utilizzando strumenti come Tosca, Postman, UI Path o framework di automazione comparabili. - Creare piani di prova, eseguire casi di test, gestire difetti, e fornire prove e report utilizzando Jira e Xray. - Definire una copertura di prova appropriata, compresa la preparazione dei dati di prova richiesti. Qualificazioni e competenze necessarie - laurea in Informatica, Tecnologia dell'informazione, o un campo relativo. - Minimo di 5 anni di esperienza nel test software. - Forte esperienza nei principi di Agile Testing, Built-In Quality e Test Automation. - Esperienza pratica con Xray e Jira per la gestione dei test e dei difetti. - Profonda comprensione dei concetti di test, delle metodologie e delle migliori pratiche del settore. - Prove capacità di tracciare i problemi e produrre report di valutazione tecnica chiari e ben strutturati. - Capacità di lavorare efficacemente in ambienti complessi e impegnativi. - Approccio altamente strutturato, rigoroso e orientato al dettaglio ai test. - Prova di progettazione e esecuzione dei test di integrazione del sistema (Sistema dei sistemi, test end-to-end). - Esperienza pratica con test API. - Ottima comunicazione e capacità di problem solving. - Fluenza in italiano e inglese. - Certificazione ISTQB (livello di formazione o superiore). - Esperienza precedente o forte comprensione del settore dei servizi bancari e/o finanziari (plus) - Familiarità con la gestione dei codici sorgente, pratiche DevOps e costruire condotte che supportano lo sviluppo del framework di automazione (plus) - Conoscenza o esperienza pratica con framework di test come Selenium, Cypress, o strumenti equivalenti (plus). ## Location Requirement - Si prega di notare che una politica di lavoro completamente remota non è offerta per questo ruolo - I candidati devono essere preparati a trasferirsi al Canton Ticino/Svizzera o città vicino al confine svizzero-italiano - Le giornate di lavoro-da-casa possono essere possibili secondo la politica del cliente - Non esitare e applica ora! La nostra ricerca personale è rivolta ai candidati di tutti i generi. I dati verranno trattati e conservati esclusivamente ai fini di questa o future selezioni, in conformità alla Legge federale sulla protezione dei dati (LPD) e garantendo i diritti di cui all'art. 13 Decreto Legislativo 196/03 e Regolamento UE 679/2016 (GDPR)

L'ingénieur de la qualité est responsable d'assurer la qualité des produits grâce à des activités d'essai continues et structurées tout au long du cycle de développement des logiciels. En étroite collaboration avec les développeurs et le propriétaire du produit, l'ingénieur de la qualité contribue activement à la planification du sprint, définit les critères d'acceptation et fournit des commentaires sur les histoires d'utilisateurs et les exigences opérationnelles afin d'assurer la clarté, la faisabilité et la testabilité. Responsabilités clés - Servir de point de contact principal au sein de l'équipe pour toutes les activités d'essais et d'assurance de la qualité (AQ), en s'approprier pleinement la qualité dans un environnement interfonctionnel (en T). - Détecter les défauts au début du processus de développement, automatiser les scénarios de test récurrents et s'assurer que les fonctionnalités fournies répondent aux attentes des entreprises et des utilisateurs. - Planifier, concevoir, mettre en œuvre, entretenir et exécuter des cas d'essais fonctionnels en fonction des exigences spécifiées. - Surveiller et gérer les activités d'essai en ce qui concerne les barrières de qualité établies. - Suivre, documenter et conduire les défauts tout au long de leur cycle de vie jusqu'à une résolution réussie. - Documenter et évaluer les résultats des tests, étudier les anomalies et identifier les causes profondes des problèmes. - Communiquer les progrès, les résultats et les risques potentiels des tests à toutes les parties prenantes concernées. - Appuyer les initiatives d'amélioration continue des processus, des outils et des méthodes d'essai d'AQ. - Exécuter et comprendre des cas de tests automatisés à l'aide d'outils tels que Tosca, Postman, UI Path ou des cadres d'automatisation comparables. - Créer des plans de test, exécuter des cas de test, gérer les défauts, et fournir des preuves et des rapports en utilisant Jira et Xray. - Définir la couverture d ' essai appropriée, y compris la préparation des données d ' essai requises. Compétences requises - Baccalauréat en informatique, en technologie de l'information ou dans un domaine connexe. - Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans les tests logiciels. - Forte expertise en essais agiles, en qualité intégrée et en automatisation des essais. - Expérience pratique avec Xray et Jira pour la gestion des tests et des défauts. - Compréhension approfondie des concepts, des méthodologies et des meilleures pratiques de l'industrie. - Capacité éprouvée de suivre les problèmes et de produire des rapports d'évaluation technique clairs et bien structurés. - Capacité de travailler efficacement dans des environnements complexes et difficiles. - Approche hautement structurée, rigoureuse et axée sur les détails. - Expérience de conception et d'exécution des tests d'intégration des systèmes (système de systèmes, essais de bout en bout). - Expérience pratique avec les tests API. - Excellente capacité de communication et de résolution de problèmes. - La fluidité en italien et en anglais. - Certification ISTQB (niveau de fondation ou plus). - Expérience antérieure ou bonne compréhension du secteur des services bancaires et/ou financiers (plus) - Connaissance de la gestion du code source, des pratiques DevOps et de la construction de pipelines pour l'élaboration d'un cadre d'automatisation (plus) - Connaissance ou expérience pratique des cadres d'essais tels que le sélénium, le cyprès ou des outils équivalents (plus). ## Lieux requis - Veuillez noter qu'une politique de travail totalement éloignée n'est pas offerte pour ce rôle - Les candidats devraient être prêts à déménager au canton du Tessin/Suisse ou dans des villes proches de la frontière entre la Suisse et l'Italie - Les journées de travail de la maison peuvent être possibles selon la politique du Client - N'hésitez pas et appliquez maintenant! Notre recherche de personnel s'adresse aux candidats de tous les sexes. Les données seront traitées et stockées exclusivement aux fins de cette sélection ou de futures sélections, conformément à la loi fédérale sur la protection des données (LPD) et garantissant les droits visés à l'art. 13 Décret législatif 196/03 et règlement de l'UE 679/2016 (RGPD)
